blockingIssues.description: Light theme still uses dark result card variables (`--result-bg`, `--result-text`, etc.), so quote/batch/bucket result cards do not render in a light card style.
Amount warning visibility is not recomputed for URL-prefilled `amount`, so non-empty amount can load with warning hidden.
Warning visibility uses `parseFloat(value) > 0` instead of non-empty amount logic required by the feature contract.
Deletion cascade logic can revert custom defaults when deleting an unrelated list because missing token index entries are treated as proof tokens came from the deleted list.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/user-testing.md` with agent-browser command caveats (`eval` vs `evaluate`/`run-code`, screenshot filename flag behavior) and static-asset rebuild guidance (`docker compose build && docker compose up -d`).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify Docker rebuild guidance to explicitly include static asset changes (`static/js`, `static/css`, `static/index.html`) as rebuild-required before UI validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: delete-ux-improvement review and handoff show static-only changes required full image rebuild to validate accurately.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Split step-2 context reads into required vs conditional reads so small UI-only tasks do not need unrelated backend/nginx/library file reads.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: tokenlist-url-display and amount-warning-cache-text reviews both found workers completing correctly while not following the current rigid read list.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit no-op/already-implemented path (what to verify, what evidence to collect, and how to report skill adherence).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: gear-badge-removal handoff reported a deviation when the feature was already complete.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a short agent-browser command compatibility note (for example, command-name differences like `eval` vs `evaluate`) before validator automation steps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cross-area-polish-flows transcript recorded repeated unknown-command failures before switching tooling.

rejectedObservations.observation: No clearly documented convention for 'system' theme representation in DOM/localStorage.
frontend-worker step-2 strict read requirement mismatch (duplicate report)
